heading: Application
label: 14521 Application
text: This subchapter applies to a vessel described in that is not measured under subchapter II of this chapter.section 14501 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised section 14521Source: Section (U.S. Code) 46 App. U.S.C. 71.Section 14521 provides that vessels that are to be measured under the regulatory measurement system in this chapter, but are not measured under the standard regulatory measurement system in subchapter II, shall be measured under the simplified measurement system.
